case_title: ADAM SCHLIFKE VS. MIKE DDONCHISHIN et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-28-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DDONCHISHIN, MIKE UNI-BODY SHOP, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,078.20 FILED BY SCHLIFKE, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT DDONCHISHIN, MIKE UNI-BODY SHOP, INC. DONCHISHIN, STEVE UNI-BODY SHOP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT STEVE DONCHISHIN WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT(DID NOT SIGN FOR CERTIFIED MAIL). CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHLIFKE, ADAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DDONCHISHIN, MIKE UNI-BODY SHOP, INC. DONCHISHIN, STEVE UNI-BODY SHOP, INC. $2,472.28 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,542.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
